meta.title: OsWL - Enterprise SCA Platform
meta.description: OsWL is an enterprise-grade Software Composition Analysis platform that continuously tracks CVE vulnerabilities and license risks across your open source dependencies.

hero.title:
Know Every Vulnerability
in Your Open Source Stack
hero.subtitle: OsWL continuously scans your dependencies for CVEs, license obligations, and transitive risks — giving security and compliance teams complete SBOM visibility from a single self-hosted platform.

features.label: Core Capabilities
features.title:
End-to-End Software
Composition Analysis
features.subtitle: From dependency ingestion to remediation, OsWL covers the full SCA lifecycle with enterprise-grade accuracy and auditability.
features.cveDesc: On-demand enrichment from deps.dev and OSV. Every component is cross-referenced against CVSS 3.x scores and patch availability.
features.licenseDesc: Automatic SPDX classification of OSS licenses — copyleft, permissive, proprietary — with obligation rules, conflict detection, and NOTICE / SPDX SBOM export per scan.
features.licenseTag: GPL · LGPL · Apache · MIT · AGPL · MPL
features.riskDesc: Track your security posture across scans. Visualize critical, high, medium, and low severity trends over time, with optional AI-generated deviation insights when an LLM provider is configured.
features.transitiveDesc: Uncover vulnerabilities hidden deep in your dependency graph. DependencyPath analysis traces both direct and transitive exposure across every supported manifest.
features.transitiveTag: Maven · npm · PyPI · Go · Cargo · NuGet · RubyGems
features.gitDesc: Connect GitHub, GitLab, or Bitbucket via Personal Access Token. Branch-aware imports, per-version snapshots, and per-project scan history out of the box.
features.cliDesc: Integrate OsWL into any build pipeline with a single CLI command. Only parsed manifest metadata is uploaded — no source code leaves your build host. Bearer-token API keys per project or organization-wide.

platform.label: Live Platform
platform.title:
Built for Security &
Compliance Teams
platform.subtitle: Every screen is engineered for actionability — from CVE triage to remediation tracking, no context switching required.
platform.altSc: OsWL Security Center — CVE triage with CVSS scores
platform.altProjects: OsWL Projects Dashboard — multi-project risk overview
platform.altLicense: OsWL License Analysis — copyleft and compliance risk tracking
platform.altRisk: OsWL Risk Trend — scan-over-scan security posture

vuln.label: Vulnerability Intelligence
vuln.title:
Prioritize What
Actually Matters
vuln.desc: OsWL surfaces exploitable, patchable vulnerabilities first. CVSS scores, exploit maturity, and fix availability are enriched automatically from deps.dev and OSV advisory feeds.
vuln.bullet1: Critical & High vulnerabilities flagged with patch targets
vuln.bullet2: Fix version surfaced — know if a patched release exists before triaging
vuln.bullet3: Transitive exposure traced to root dependency paths
vuln.bullet4: Bulk status updates — mark findings reviewed or ignored in one action

license.label: License Intelligence
license.title:
Eliminate
Compliance Blind Spots
license.desc: Automatically classify every SPDX license across your dependency tree. Identify copyleft obligations, license conflicts, and components that need manual legal review before they reach production.
license.bullet1: Copyleft licenses requiring full source disclosure
license.bullet2: Weak copyleft or dual-licensed — legal review recommended
license.bullet3: Permissive licenses — safe for commercial use

workflow.label: Workflow
workflow.title:
Up and Scanning
in Minutes
workflow.subtitle: OsWL integrates directly into your existing development workflow. No agents, no heavyweight setup.
workflow.step1Desc: Add a GitHub, GitLab, or Bitbucket Personal Access Token. OsWL discovers repositories and branches and imports manifests — no source code upload required.
workflow.step2Desc: OsWL parses your lock files and build manifests, resolves the transitive dependency graph, and cross-references every component against deps.dev, OSV, and your license policy.
workflow.step3Desc: Review findings in the Security Center, filter by severity, bulk-update statuses, and track your risk posture scan-over-scan in the Risk Trend dashboard.
workflow.step4Desc: Gate pull requests with the OsWL CLI. Bearer-token API keys enable automated scanning in any pipeline — Jenkins, GitHub Actions, GitLab CI, or custom build servers.

cta.title:
Secure Your
Open Source Stack
cta.sub: Deploy OsWL on-premise and gain full SBOM visibility across every project, team, and dependency in your organization.
